message:
fix: insert MCP/custom tool descriptions before project docs in system prompt (GAP-6.01)

The spec's 5-layer system prompt ordering requires tool descriptions (layer 3)
before project-specific instructions (layer 4). Previously, MCP and custom tool
descriptions were appended after project docs. Now they are passed into
BuildSystemPrompt via an extraTools parameter and inserted at the correct layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
